productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Duramo Luxury White Shoe
description: Luxuriously cushioned, this adidas Duramo Luxury 3 running shoe for women is stylishly designed and filled with ample comfort, making running a pleasure through every mile. Pair this with jeans and cool, slogan tees for casual occasions.UpperSynthetic double mesh upper and tongue for maximum ventilation and protection from abrasion and blisteringCushioned tongue with front fabric overlay for added comfortSynthetic leather overlays for added shoe structure and midfoot supportAdded synthetic overlays around sockliner and backfoot for enhanced support to the footThree striped overlays on sides representing the brand's motto of perseverence and performanceSynthetic laces for snug Fit and durabilitySymmetrical lace up system for protection from abrasionadidas logo on tongue to create a fashion statementAdidas logo with heat transfer technology on backfoot for dry comfortCushioned sockliner for in step comfort and to lock the backfoot in placeSynthetic overlay at upper heel cup for enhanced durabilityMidsoleEVA insole for comfort and durabilityInjected EVA midsole for durability and lightweight cushioningAdiPrene cushioning for superior shock absorption, greater propulsion and forefoot resiliencePadded footbed for impact protection and comfortOutsoleMade of durable rubber for ehanced shoe life and cushioningForefoot and heel separated for enhanced traction and support, and connected with an impact guidance shank for better traction and gripReinforced toe guard on the upper for forefoot protectionTORSION SYSTEM in the foot arch for midfoot integrityadiWEAR outsole using non-marking rubber for enhanced durability, abrasion resistance and sturdinessWash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
